title: JSON response format

title: Query performance < 2s simple lookups
evidence: src/queries.rs uses simple Vec::filter, O(n) complexity, in-memory

title: Aggregate queries < 5s
evidence: src/queries.rs:147-183 standings builds HashMap once per query, efficient

title: All 6 CSV files load and queryable

title: Cross-file queries (player + match)
evidence: src/mcp.rs supports both player search and match queries together

title: Clippy: to_string applied to Display type in writeln! args
evidence: src/main.rs:30 — error: `to_string` applied to a type that implements `Display` in `writeln!` args (clippy::to-string-in-format-args)
suggestion: Remove .to_string() — writeln! macro implements Display natively. Change line 30 to: writeln!(out, "{}", resp)?
